Class MemorizedResultSet

java.lang.Object
net.sf.jailer.modelbuilder.MemorizedResultSet
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, ResultSet, Wrapper
public class MemorizedResultSet extends Object implements ResultSet
Memorized Result set.

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    Methods inherited from interface java.sql.ResultSet

    updateObject, updateObject, updateObject, updateObject

  • Constructor Details

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(List<Object[]> rowList)
      Constructor. Creates a memorized result set from a pre-built row list without meta data.
      Parameters:
      rowList - the list of rows to memorize

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(List<Object[]> rowList, int numCol, String[] names, int[] types, String[] typeNames)
      Constructor. Creates a memorized result set from a pre-built row list with full meta data.
      Parameters:
      rowList - the list of rows to memorize
      numCol - the number of columns
      names - the column names
      types - the SQL column types
      typeNames - the SQL column type names

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(List<Object[]> rowList, int numCol, String[] names, int[] types)
      Constructor. Creates a memorized result set from a pre-built row list with meta data (without type names).
      Parameters:
      rowList - the list of rows to memorize
      numCol - the number of columns
      names - the column names
      types - the SQL column types

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(List<Object[]> rowList, MemorizedResultSet.MemorizedResultSetMetaData resultSetMetaData)
      Constructor. Creates a memorized result set from a pre-built row list with the given meta data.
      Parameters:
      rowList - the list of rows to memorize
      resultSetMetaData - the meta data to associate with this result set

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(ResultSet resultSet, Integer limit, Session session, Object cancellationContext) throws SQLException
      Constructor. Reads and memorizes all rows from the given result set.
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set to read from
      limit - maximum number of rows to read, or null for no limit
      session - the database session
      cancellationContext - context object used for cancellation checks, or null
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • MemorizedResultSet

      public MemorizedResultSet(ResultSet resultSet, Integer limit, Session session, Object cancellationContext, int[] projection, String[] columnNames) throws SQLException
      Constructor. Reads and memorizes rows from the given result set, optionally projecting columns.
      Parameters:
      resultSet - the result set to read from
      limit - maximum number of rows to read, or null for no limit
      session - the database session
      cancellationContext - context object used for cancellation checks, or null
      projection - optional array of 1-based column indices to project, or null for all columns
      columnNames - optional array of column names to use instead of the result set column names, or null
      Throws:
      SQLException

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the cursor to before the first row.

    • getSize

      public int getSize()
      Gets the number of rows in this result set.
      Returns:
      the number of rows

    • getRowList

      public List<Object[]> getRowList()
      Gets the underlying list of rows.
      Returns:
      the list of rows

    • prepareHook

      protected void prepareHook(ResultSetMetaData rmd) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • readRowHook

      protected void readRowHook(ResultSet resultSet) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • convertCellContent

      protected Object convertCellContent(MemorizedResultSet.ContentSupplier objectSupplier) throws SQLException
      Throws:
      SQLException

    • removeNullRows

      public void removeNullRows(int columnIndex)
      Removes all rows where the value at the given column index is null.
      Parameters:
      columnIndex - the 1-based column index to check for null values

    • getObject

      public Object getObject(int columnIndex) throws SQLException
      Specified by:
      getObject in interface ResultSet
      Throws:
